name: Mauna Loa
eruptionHistory: The world's largest active volcano. Erupted in November 2022 after 38 years of quiet. Has erupted 33 times since 1843.
description: Mauna Loa is the world's largest active volcano by volume and area. When measured from its base on the ocean floor, it rises over 9,000 meters — taller than Mount Everest.
